title: My Training
preferencesTooltip: To modify your preferences (frequency, duration), go to Settings
weekCompleteDesc: You've completed all your sessions. Keep it up!
checkinRequiredDesc: 2 minutes to review and unlock your next training week.
noSessionsDesc: Generate your weekly program to start training
noSessionsHistoryDesc: This week hasn't been generated yet

generatingOverlay.title: Creating your program
generatingOverlay.subtitle: AI is analyzing your goals to create the perfect program

session.loadingPersist: If loading persists, go back to training.
session.skipReady: You can skip when you're ready
session.exerciseCompleteDesc: Take a short break and move to the next one.

feedback.title: Well done!
feedback.subtitle: Take 30 seconds to tell us how it went.
feedback.rpeQuestion: How do you feel? (Perceived effort 1 to 10)
feedback.commentPlaceholder: e.g. Exercise X too hard, great session, etc.
feedback.thankYouDesc: Your feedback helps us improve your program.
feedback.errorDesc: Unable to save your feedback. Please try again.
